title: Deposit not visible triage
steps: Confirm payment method, amount, currency, and transaction timestamp.
Compare elapsed time with the method-specific waiting window.
Check whether a financial-operations task already exists.
If the waiting window has not passed, explain the pending timeframe to the customer.
If the waiting window has passed, request successful payment proof and create or update the task.
Return only the customer-safe status and next step.
customer_safe_summary: We will check the deposit status and request payment proof if the normal processing window has passed.

title: Processed withdrawal not received
steps: Confirm withdrawal status, processed date, amount, and payment method.
Check whether the settlement window has passed.
If the window is still active, explain the expected waiting period.
If the window has passed, request a complete bank statement for the relevant date range.
If a tracking reference was provided and the bank cannot locate funds, request the bank's official response.
Escalate the proof package to financial operations.
customer_safe_summary: We will verify the processed withdrawal details and request bank proof if the normal receiving window has passed.

title: Mandatory verification support flow
steps: Check whether verification is voluntary, mandatory, pending, rejected, or completed.
Identify the missing document category without exposing internal review notes.
Direct the customer to upload the required documents through the approved flow.
Explain the expected review window when all documents are uploaded.
Escalate to the verification team if status conflicts or the customer disputes the decision.
Do not promise account reactivation.
customer_safe_summary: Verification protects the account and transactions; restrictions can be reviewed after the required documents are submitted.

title: Password and account-access recovery
steps: Confirm the customer is asking about their own account.
Guide the customer to the password recovery flow.
Recommend checking email delivery, spam folders, and registered contact details.
If the registered email is inaccessible, route to account verification.
Avoid changing account contact details without identity verification.
customer_safe_summary: Use the password recovery flow first; contact or ownership changes require identity verification.

title: Bonus question handling
steps: Check active bonus state and promo-code availability for the customer.
Identify whether the customer asks about bonus receipt, turnover, withdrawal impact, or removal.
Explain general mechanics without promising eligibility.
If a bonus was removed, explain that a new offer depends on available promo codes.
If financial impact is disputed, route to the responsible support queue with account evidence.
customer_safe_summary: Bonus availability and progress depend on the customer's active offer and account status.

title: Live chat operating flow
steps: Greet and identify the issue concisely.
Ask only for information needed for the next step.
Use hold language when checking systems or consulting another queue.
Transfer only with context, not as an unexplained handoff.
Confirm whether the customer needs anything else before closure.
Tag the conversation with the correct issue category.
customer_safe_summary: Chat responses should be concise, warm, and explicit about the next step.

title: Bilingual support call flow
steps: Open with a warm greeting and confirm the customer's issue.
Use the customer's language preference where possible.
Verify account context before discussing account-specific status.
Explain pending payment or verification windows in simple language.
Avoid internal-only language on the call.
Close with the next step and expected follow-up channel.
customer_safe_summary: Calls should combine empathy, verification discipline, and a clear next step in the customer's preferred language.

title: Priority support escalation flow
steps: Acknowledge urgency and customer value without promising a different policy outcome.
Identify the governing domain: verification, payment, bonus, account access, complaint, or technical issue.
Attach required evidence before escalation.
Assign the owning queue and expected follow-up path.
Keep approval gates active for refunds, restrictions, limits, and sensitive disclosures.
customer_safe_summary: Priority handling accelerates ownership and empathy; it does not bypass verification, payment, or disclosure controls.
